creator: shmit@rcn.com
text:
When booting the above kernel config, with sources CVSupped to-day
(03-November-98), I get the following message while booting:

config> autocheck gives assize=0 asp=0

The comes right after the memory probe. At this point my machine hangs.

Fix: 

Dunno.
How-To-Repeat: 
Boot the above kernel.
